root_text.an10.171:1.3: Adhammañca viditvā anatthañca, dhammañca viditvā atthañca yathā dhammo yathā attho tathā paṭipajjitabbaṁ.
root_text.an10.171:2.1: Katamo ca, bhikkhave, adhammo ca anattho ca?
root_text.an10.171:2.2: Pāṇātipāto, adinnādānaṁ, kāmesumicchācāro, musāvādo, pisuṇā vācā, pharusā vācā, samphappalāpo, abhijjhā, byāpādo, micchādiṭṭhi—
root_text.an10.171:2.3: ayaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, adhammo ca anattho ca.
root_text.an10.171:3.1: Katamo ca, bhikkhave, dhammo ca attho ca?
root_text.an10.171:3.2: Pāṇātipātā veramaṇī, adinnādānā veramaṇī, kāmesumicchācārā veramaṇī, musāvādā veramaṇī, pisuṇāya vācāya veramaṇī, pharusāya vācāya veramaṇī, samphappalāpā veramaṇī, anabhijjhā, abyāpādo, sammādiṭṭhi—
root_text.an10.171:3.3: ayaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, dhammo ca attho ca.
root_text.an10.171:4.3: Adhammañca viditvā anatthañca, dhammañca viditvā atthañca yathā dhammo yathā attho tathā paṭipajjitabban’ti,
root_text.an10.171:4.4: iti yaṁ taṁ vuttaṁ, idametaṁ paṭicca vuttan”ti.

translation_text.an10.171:1.1: “Mendicants, you should know bad principles with bad results.
translation_text.an10.171:1.2: And you should know good principles with good results.
translation_text.an10.171:1.3: Knowing these things, your practice should follow the good principles with good results.
translation_text.an10.171:2.1: And what are bad principles with bad results?
translation_text.an10.171:2.2: Killing living creatures, stealing, and sexual misconduct; speech that’s false, divisive, harsh, or nonsensical; covetousness, ill will, and wrong view.
translation_text.an10.171:2.3: These are called bad principles with bad results.
translation_text.an10.171:3.1: And what are good principles with good results?
translation_text.an10.171:3.2: Avoiding killing living creatures, stealing, and sexual misconduct; avoiding speech that’s false, divisive, harsh, or nonsensical; contentment, good will, and right view.
translation_text.an10.171:3.3: These are called good principles with good results.
translation_text.an10.171:4.1: ‘You should know bad principles with bad results.
translation_text.an10.171:4.2: And you should know good principles with good results.
translation_text.an10.171:4.3: Knowing these things, your practice should follow the good principles with good results.’
translation_text.an10.171:4.4: That’s what I said, and this is why I said it.”
